name: Hacienda Hamburger
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat in oil in an electric skillet or large frying pan.
2. Add celery and onion; cover and cook slowly for 10 minutes.
3. Add tomato paste, water, noodles, cheese, olives, salt, and pepper; stir to combine.
4. Cook slowly until the noodles are tender, about 30 minutes.
Note: This is just as good on the second day.
